name: Adda Corporation
summary: Adda Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells electronic thermal management products primarily for the information technology industry worldwide. The company offers CPU cooler modules, blower fans, DC axial-flow/blower fans, AC axial-flow fans, and waterproof fans; thermal modules; and accessories, such as metal finger guards and plastic filters. Adda Corporation was incorporated in 1978 and is based in Pingtung, Taiwan.
